sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by percentage allocation to tangent portfolio corresponding to desired standard deviation coordinate on Capital Market Line. Requires efficient frontier lookup table with standard deviation-to-allocation mapping. Parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown) not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by the percentage of assets to invest in the tangent portfolio corresponding to your target standard deviation on the Capital Market Line (CML), accounting for whether reinvestment is applied.
